body.desc: The main topic or section title, e.g., 'WHAT WE DO · OUR SOLUTION'.

title.desc: A summary of the solutions, e.g., 'An answer to each, by design'.

subtitle.desc: Description of the solution, e.g., 'A marketplace that connects verified SMEs directly with inve'.

subtitle_2.desc: Description of the solution, e.g., 'Cash-flow, data-driven scoring built on verified tax records'.

subtitle_3.desc: Description of the solution, e.g., 'Revenue-based repayment: SMEs repay a percentage of verified'.

subtitle_4.desc: Description of the solution, e.g., 'An investor yield product with risk grades, repayment scenar'.
